thag10.2:1.4: for one staying alone in the forest.
thag10.2:2.2: I will go to the wilderness praised by the Awakened One
thag10.2:2.4:
dwelling alone.
Alone, astute in my goal, I’ll quickly enter the grove
thag10.2:3.2: the haunt of elephants in rut.
thag10.2:4.1: When the Cool Forest’s in full flower,
thag10.2:4.4:
I’ll walk back & forth alone.
Ah, when will I dwell,
thag10.2:6.1: As I desire to do this,
thag10.2:6.3: I myself will bring it about.
thag10.2:6.4: No one can do it for anyone else. * * *
thag10.2:7.1: I myself bind on my armor.
thag10.2:7.4: without having attained the end of the effluents.
thag10.2:8.4: as I sit on a mountaintop.
thag10.2:9.1: In the forest covered with blossoms
thag10.2:9.2: or perhaps on a cool hillside,
thag10.2:9.3: blessed with the bliss of release,
thag10.2:10.1: I am now he whose resolves are fulfilled
thag10.2:10.2: like the moon on a full-moon night.
thag10.2:10.4: there is now no further becoming.
